text: Telvar, the market whispers of a lost parcel. Walk with me—this is a trial you can carry without flame.
speaker: Myramar

choices.text: I'll recover it from the spice lane.

text: Then keep your eyes open; Secundus rewards the swift and swallows the hesitant.
speaker: Myramar

text: Good. Return when the crate rests in honest hands again.
speaker: Myramar
